Dear [First Name],

[**Verify My Account**](https://verifyaccount.com)

If you did not request this verification, it may indicate that someone is attempting to access your account. In such a case, please contact us immediately at **support@bankname.com** or call our customer service line at **1-800-XXX-XXXX**.

For your security, we recommend:
- Never sharing your login credentials with anyone
- Using strong, unique passwords
- Enabling two-factor authentication (2FA) for added security

Thank you for being a valued customer. We appreciate your attention to this important security matter.

Best regards,  
**[Bank Name] Customer Support Team**

---

Sincerely,  
[Bank Name]
